markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Innerwell and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy and collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Innerwell offers ketamine therapy and other mental health services, with a focus on clinical rigor and licensed therapists](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Current SEO efforts include \~500 city-level pages and state-level landing pages, but traffic is minimal](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2165.0)
  - [GrowthX will develop programmatic SEO strategies, aiming for significant traffic increases by month 3](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Collaboration will involve weekly meetings, with Akina as the main point of contact for content review](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

## Topics

### Innerwell's Business Model and Target Audience

  - [Offers ketamine therapy, psychiatry, EMDR, and talk therapy](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Target audience: 18+ in specific states, fairly even gender split](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Key metric: Net patient starts (patients who complete first appointment)](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Customer journey: Mostly direct response, with 6-8% of leads converting](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [New flow coming soon: Allowing scheduling before payment](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2548.0)

### Current SEO Efforts

  - [\~500 city-level pages with 4 services (2000 total pages)](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2149.0)
  - [State-level landing pages for ketamine therapy](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2134.0)
  - [Some condition-specific landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2483.0)
  - [Limited unique content, mostly dynamically generated](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2207.0)
  - [Traffic and conversions from these pages are currently minimal](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competitors: Mindbloom, Better U, Wonder Med, Joyous, Journey Clinical](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2233.0)
  - [Innerwell positioned as more affordable than Mindbloom, but with higher clinical rigor](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2844.0)
  - [Most competitors not heavily invested in SEO, especially local SEO](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=2967.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Timeline

  - [Week 1-2: Research and identify topical opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Week 2-3: Initial calibration articles and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Week 4: Aim to reach consistent weekly production](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Month 3: Expect first significant traffic spike (150-200 clicks/week)](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [Month 5-6: More reliable conversion data for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/r7EpEfHzLAk8AsR3bn9czfXoMPiJaT_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)

## Next Steps

  - GrowthX to review provided documents and access
  - Develop initial set of topical opportunities for next meeting
  - Innerwell to provide:
      - Access to Google Ads Manager
      - Top keywords report
      - Any additional context on Meta advertising effectiveness
  - Schedule next week's meeting to discuss initial findings and strategy
